channel.title: china-static:commodities
channel.description: Static RSS merge for china variant (commodities)

item.title: Jindalee Lithium inks stewardship MoU for McDermitt project
item.dc:creator: Mining.com
item.description: The MoU establishes a framework for HiTech and RESOLVE to explore the creation of a voluntary Stewardship Area in the broader Oregon-Nevada caldera region.

item.title: Aclara Resources gets environmental OK for Chile rare earths project
item.dc:creator: Mining.com
item.description: It wraps up a process that has taken longer than four years for the project.

item.title: Deutsche Bank cuts Q3 gold price target by 22%
item.dc:creator: Mining.com
item.description: The German investment bank said it now sees gold averaging $4,300/oz. in the third quarter of this year.

item.title: BHP and Rio Tinto test electric trucks to clean up iron ore
item.dc:creator: Mining.com
item.description: Industry leaders begin testing electric haul trucks as major miners seek to cut emissions at scale.

item.title: US gives Cameco-backed Westinghouse $17.5B nuclear boost
item.dc:creator: Mining.com
item.description: The goal is to accelerate the deployment of 10 large-scale commercial nuclear reactors by up to three years.

item.title: New AbraSilver study quadruples Argentina project value
item.dc:creator: Mining.com
item.description: Diablillos is expected to generate an after-tax net present value of about $3 billion and a 42% internal rate of return.

item.title: Op-Ed: Brazil’s rare earth dilemma — strategic autonomy or another raw-material export cycle?
item.dc:creator: Mining.com
item.description: Serra Verde is key for Brazil's rare earths, influencing their role in a non-Chinese mine-to-magnet supply chain.

item.title: Hyundai backs ioneer’s Nevada lithium-boron project
item.dc:creator: Mining.com
item.description: New partnerships boost financing and development plans for one of North America's most advanced lithium projects.

item.title: Ground view Kazakhstan: The visibility bargain
item.dc:creator: Mining.com
item.description: Qarmet, a Kazakhstani steel and mining company, inherited deadly mines and responded with extensive surveillance.

item.title: US sanctions shut Canada’s only cobalt refinery
item.dc:creator: Mining.com
item.description: Sherritt’s refinery in Alberta goes idle as sanctions disrupt Cuban nickel supply and force cost-cutting measures.
